mandates.mandate: Never auto-prune. Always present findings and let the user decide.
Conductor sidecar routing-log is excluded from staleness checks (append-only).
Invoked on demand via /symphony-memory-hygiene workflow, not automatically.

detection-heuristics.heuristic: Decision's traces_to file no longer exists.
Decision conflicts with current version of referenced artifact.
Decision older than 3 sprints with no recent references.

step.title: Scan sidecars
step.action: List all *-sidecar/ directories in _symphony/_memory/. Exclude conductor-sidecar.

step.title: Read decisions
step.action: For each sidecar: read decisions.yaml. Skip if empty or absent.

step.title: Apply detection heuristics
step.action: For each decision: run all 4 heuristics. Flag matches.

step.title: Compile report
step.action: Group findings by sidecar, then by heuristic category.
Header: "Memory hygiene scan complete. Recommended cadence: before each sprint."

step.title: Present actions
step.action: Per finding offer: [p]rune, [u]pdate, [a]rchive, [k]eep. Wait for user. Apply.
